subject: Re:
body:
ask her to call and explain


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, June 10, 2008 7:48:24 AM
Subject: FW:


 
 
From:Jennie Saunders [mailto:Jennie.Saunders@coreaccess.net] 
Sent: Monday, June 09, 2008 6:28 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: 
 
Dear Leslie,
 
Hope all is well. Wanted to fill you/Jeffrey in on a program that has been created based on Founding Member requests to add people - important clients, friends, family, colleagues, etc - to their memberships. We have so far collaborated with around ten Founders to create a membership that worked for their individual needs, and have now taken their ideas to shape them into a formal offering. Would love to get Jeffrey’s feedback on the offering so that ultimately it’s something that he feels 100% comfortable in supporting. 
 
Specific terms are as follows:
 
Add up to four people to Founding membership – initiation fee waived
 
Waived dues for Founder until 2010;  pay 50% of dues for next five years(additional members pay regular dues)
 
$1,000 Founder credit for all goods and services for 60 months; unused monthly credit rolls over to next month, provided, unused credit at end of each fiscal year is forfeited ---- Jeffrey can have anyone he would like use this credit
Guests allowed w/o Founding Member being present
 
Access to all future CORE: clubs for no additional fee
 
Apply $100k Founding Member contribution to Founding Member Upgrade membership
 
 
We need this to be an offering that Jeffrey will endorse, so all honest feedback is greatly appreciated. Thanks so much. 
 
Best, Jennie
 
 
CORE:Jennie Saunders | President and Chief Executive Officer | 66 East 55thStreet New York NY 10022 | Main: 212 486 6600 | Mobile: 917 330 1033 | jennie.saunders@coreaccess.net | www.coreaccess.net |
 
DISCLAIMER Important! This message is intended for the above named person(s) only and is CONFIDENTIAL AND PROPRIETARY.
If you are not the intended recipient of this e-mail and have received it in error, please forward to ITsupport@coreaccess.net with
'Received in Error' as the subject and then delete it from your mailbox. Accessing, copying or re-using any of the information contained
in this e-mail by anyone other than the intended recipient is unauthorized. Thank you.
